name: 🐛 Bug Report

## Bug Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is -->

## Severity
<!-- Choose one -->
- [ ] **P0 - Critical** (App broken, data loss, security issue)
- [ ] **P1 - High** (Core feature broken, workaround exists)
- [ ] **P2 - Medium** (Feature works partially, UX issue)
- [ ] **P3 - Low** (Cosmetic, nice-to-have fix)

## Module
<!-- Which part of the app is affected? -->
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Billing (Customers, Invoices, Payments)
- [ ] Resellers
- [ ] Network Management (PPPoE, Hotspot)
- [ ] MikroTik Script Generator
- [ ] Monitoring
- [ ] SMS/WhatsApp Integration
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Steps To Reproduce
<!-- Steps to reproduce the behavior -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
<!-- A clear description of what you expected to happen -->

## Actual Behavior
<!-- What actually happened -->

## Screenshots
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem -->

## Environment
<!-- Please fill in the following information -->
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows, macOS, Linux]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **Server Environment**: [Local / Railway / VPS]
- **Database**: [PostgreSQL / In-Memory]
- **App Version**: [e.g. 2.0.0]

```
Paste any console errors here
```

**Server Logs:**
```
Check server/logs/error.log and paste relevant errors
```

<!-- Add any other context about the problem here -->
